title: Peamo-Nimbus
long_description:
Peamo Network aims to build custom servers for the Wii U and 3DS family of consoles.
Peamo-Nimbus is a fork of Nimbus which allows to connect to Peamo Network.

Website: https://peamo-network.ixchats.com/
script_message: If you have any bugs or issues, chat in our Discord server. The invite is on our website: https://peamo-network.ixchats.com/
